name: DuPont Fabros Technology, Inc.
description: DuPont Fabros Technology, Inc. was a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owned, developer, operated, and managed enterprise-class, carrier-neutral multi-tenant data centers. The company's facilities were designed to offer highly specialized, redundant power and cooling systems to support the computer servers and network equipment of its customers. DuPont Fabros Technology served a diverse range of technology-driven industries, including technology, internet, and telecommunications companies. In 2017, the company was acquired by Digital Realty Trust, Inc.
